zh.lifeSummary: 當Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland於1224年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 維其可洛福阿可洛福時，他的父親Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland24歲，母親Joan De Marisco22歲。他於1242年與Margery de Burgh在英國史洛普爾維姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1248年12月26日在愛爾蘭庫迪 迪拉利卡里克享年24歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 維其可洛福阿可洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland于1224年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 維其可洛福阿可洛福时，他的父亲Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland24岁，母亲Joan De Marisco22岁。他于1242年与Margery de Burgh在英国史洛普爾維姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1248年12月26日在爱尔兰庫迪 迪拉利卡里克享年24岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 維其可洛福阿可洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland was born in 1224, in Arklow, County Wicklow, Ireland, his father, Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland, was 24 and his mother, Joan De Marisco, was 22. He married Margery de Burgh in 1242, in Wem, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 26 December 1248, in Carrick, County Tipperary, Ireland, at the age of 24, and was buried in Arklow, County Wicklow, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland est né en 1224, à Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlande, son père, Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan De Marisco, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margery de Burgh en 1242, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 26 décembre 1248, à Carrick, County Tipperary, Irlande, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterré à Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland 1224 in Arklow, County Wicklow, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland 24 und seine Mutter Joan De Marisco 22. Er hat 1242 in Wem, Shropshire, England Margery de Burgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Dezember 1248 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Carrick, County Tipperary, Irland und wurde in Arklow, County Wicklow, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland è nato il nel 1224 nel Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlanda, il suo padre, Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joan De Marisco, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margery de Burgh nel 1242, nel Wem, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 dicembre 1248, nel Carrick, County Tipperary, Irlanda, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolto a Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Irelandが1224年にアイルランドコウントイ ウィックロウアルクロウで生まれた時，父Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Irelandは24歳，母Joan De Mariscoは22歳であった。1242年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムでMargery de Burghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1248年12月26日にアイルランドコウントイ ティップエラリーカーリックで24歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ウィックロウアルクロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland(이)가 1224년 아일랜드 카운티 윅로 아클로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan De Marisco(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1242년 영국 슈럽실르 베에서 Margery de Burgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1248년 12월 26일 아일랜드 카운티 티페라리 카릭에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 윅로 아클로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland nasceu em 1224, em Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlanda, seu pai, Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan De Marisco, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery de Burgh em 1242, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de dezembro de 1248, em Carrick, County Tipperary, Irlanda, com 24 anos, e foi sepultado em Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland родился в 1224 г. в местности арклоу, коунти викклоу, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan De Marisco, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Burgh в 1242 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 26 декабря 1248 г. в местности каррикк, коунти типпирэри, Ирландия в возрасте 24 лет и был похоронен в местности арклоу, коунти викклоу, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland nació en 1224, en Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlanda, su papá, Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan De Marisco, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margery de Burgh en 1242, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de diciembre de 1248, en Carrick, County Tipperary, Irlanda, a la edad de 24 años, y fue sepultado en Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlanda.
